tweets.text: 🎯 Every AI model has superpowers. GPT excels at general tasks, Claude at analysis, Gemini at creative work. Smart routing means leveraging each model's strengths automatically. #AI #ModelRouting #LLM #AIOptimization #TechInnovation
tweets.name: Switchpoint AI

tweets.text:
One thing AI infra teams underestimate: reliability gets messy fast once you’re juggling GPT, Claude, Gemini, and fallback logic across providers.

That’s why @futurmix is interesting — one OpenAI-compatible endpoint, multi-model routing, auto-failover, and centralized
tweets.name: Gary Ko

tweets.text: For teams shipping across GPT, Claude, Gemini, and Seedance, the hard part isn't model access—it's routing, failover, and observability in production. @futurmix is interesting because it turns reliability into one API instead of glue code. https://t.co/peVorAob8g #AI #LLM
tweets.name: Cc(Merlin🔮🧙)

tweets.text: 💡 The future of AI is multi-model. Instead of choosing between GPT, Claude, or Gemini, why not route intelligently to each model's strengths? Better results, lower costs, higher reliability. #AIRouting #LLM #ArtificialIntelligence #TechStrategy #Innovation

由于一个名为 Axios 的第三方开发者工具被黑客“投毒”，OpenAI 的 macOS 应用签名流程遭到了严重的供应链攻击。

简单来说，黑客通过操纵代码库，试图通过 OpenAI 官方的审核机制，把“假冒”或“恶意”的 APP 伪装成官方应用分发给用户。据调查，这波攻击极有可能与特定国家背景的黑客组织有关。

What a Context Engineer does:

→ Decides what reaches the LLM context window
→ Builds memory (working vs long-term)
→ Designs retrieval & ranking systems
→ Manages context isolation across agents
→ Implements MCP integrations

Sound familiar?
